prompt: Create a simple JavaScript module bundler with two files: bundler.js (exports a bundle(entryPath) function that resolves require() calls recursively, builds a dependency graph, and concatenates modules with IIFE wrappers so each module gets its own scope with a module.exports object) and cli.js (reads an entry file path from process.argv[2] and writes the bundle to bundle.js). Test it with the sample modules in the src/ directory.
description: Build a minimal JS module bundler with dependency resolution
